'''Atloran''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Panto system]]. It was a barren, lifeless sphere of a world, but nevertheless was known for its zero-gravity campgrounds and amusement parks. There were seven [[Gravity/Legends|zero-gee]] camps around the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and they catered to [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] who had special gravity needs or [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species who wanted to enjoy the challenge and benefits of no gravity.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>
